description_long: This is a modern mountain bike with a bright green frame and black accents, designed for off-road and urban cycling. The frame is constructed in a classic diamond geometry, featuring a front suspension fork and a rear shock absorber for enhanced comfort and control on rough terrain. The bike is equipped with two large, knobby tires mounted on black alloy rims, providing excellent grip and stability. The handlebars are flat and wide, offering precise steering and control, while the seat is a standard saddle positioned for an aggressive riding posture. The drivetrain includes a rear derailleur and multiple gears, suitable for varied inclines and speeds. No basket or rack is attached, emphasizing its sporty and performance-oriented design.
description: A bright green mountain bike with a diamond frame, flat handlebars, and knobby tires, built for rugged and urban environments. It features front and rear suspension, a standard saddle, and no basket or rack.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide flat handlebars, front suspension fork, and the narrow profile of the tires.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the diamond frame geometry, rear suspension, drivetrain, and the full length of the bike.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the seat, rear wheel, and the alignment of the frame and handlebars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the frame, suspension, and drivetrain from the other side.
